name: Dragon metal shard
rationale: Smithing component for dragon platebody; drop Melee/Slayer.

name: Dragonbone necklace
rationale: All-style +10 attack neck with defining +12 Prayer (glory-style + Prayer).

name: Adamant heraldic helm
rationale: Decorative heraldic helm -> Cosmetics + Melee; drop Construction (whole kiteshield/helm family).

name: Extended super antifire(4)
rationale: Antifire is not a combat boost -> Herblore only; drop Melee/Slayer.
comments: Antifires and super antifires could be a slayer resource asdragons are often assigned. This is a larger discussion that needs to be had about what is or is not a slayer item, and likely will rework this tab individually.

rationale: Barbarian Assault machine ammo -> Range; drop Misc.
